defs: see 跋胡疐尾[ba2 hu2 zhi4 wei3]
see 跋胡疐尾[ba2 hu2 zhi4 wei3]
to travel over land and water (idiom)
(Tw) (folk religion) to divine by casting moon blocks 筊杯[jiao3 bei1] (from Taiwanese, Tai-lo pr. [pua̍h-pue]) (equivalent to Mandarin 擲筊|掷筊[zhi4 jiao3])
(idiom, from Book of Songs) unable to advance or retreat
short comment or critical appraisal added at the end of a text, on a painting etc
